---
title: "Social Updates"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.column-page}

## 📱 Social Feed

::: {.social-card style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; gap: 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05); padding: 25px; border-radius: 16px; margin-bottom: 40px; background: #f0f7ff; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.02);"}
::: {.social-content}
### XXII INQUA Congress 2027 India
**“Quaternary Science As Societal Services”**
Lucknow, India | **January 28 - February 3, 2027**

The biggest conference in Quaternary Sciences, featuring **188 Scientific Sessions**, **21 Workshops**, and **46 Field Trips**. Funding available for participants.

**📢 Important Update:**
*   **Abstract Submission EXTENDED:** 31st March, 2026

<div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 20px;">
[Register Now](https://register.inquaindia2027.in/){style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 50px; text-decoration: none; color: #1a5f7a; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem;"}
[First Circular (PDF)](https://framerusercontent.com/assets/uuOMCk51ous9qnKWe3ZLZbrTglI.pdf){style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 50px; text-decoration: none; color: #1a5f7a; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem;"}
</div>
:::
::: {.social-media style="display: flex; align-items: center;"}
[![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/Wi4L9x9xNpZwAWcwIW4zC1GU6lY.png?scale-down-to=1024&width=1992&height=2008){style="border-radius: 12px; width: 100%; box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);"}](https://www.inquaindia2027.in/)
:::
:::

::: {.social-card style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; gap: 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05); padding: 25px; border-radius: 16px; margin-bottom: 40px; background: #fff9f0; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.02);"}
::: {.social-content}
### Western Regional Conference: IASP 2026
**“Demographic Transition in Western India”**
Goa Business School, Goa University | **March 20-21, 2026**

A premier conference focusing on the demographic shifts and socio-economic transitions in Western India.

**📅 Last Date for Online Abstract Submission:** 15th February, 2026

<div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 20px;">
[Submit Abstract](https://forms.gle/dxgmZAGrdk5HdWVw5){style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 50px; text-decoration: none; color: #d35400; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem;"}
[Download PDF](social/population_iasp_2026.pdf){style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 50px; text-decoration: none; color: #d35400; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem;"}
</div>
:::
::: {.social-media style="display: flex; align-items: center;"}
[![](https://iasp.ac.in/2026/goa2026.jpg?v=1771343496){style="border-radius: 12px; width: 100%; box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);"}](social/population_iasp_2026.pdf)
:::
:::

::: {.social-card style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; gap: 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05); padding: 25px; border-radius: 16px; margin-bottom: 40px; background: #f5f3ff; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.02);"}
::: {.social-content}
### Directory of Geographical Institutions in India
A comprehensive list of leading geographical associations and societies across India, fostering academic excellence and spatial research.

**🌐 Official Web Portals:**
*   **National:** [NAGI (New Delhi)](http://nagi.org.in/) | [IGS (Chennai)](http://www.igschennai.org/) | [GSI (Kolkata)](http://geographicalsocietyofindia.org.in/) | [NGSI (Varanasi)](http://ngsi.in/)
*   **Specialized:** [IIG (Pune)](http://iigpune.in/) | [IGI (Geomorphologists)](http://www.indiageomorph.org/) | [ILEE (Ecology)](http://ilee.org.in/) | [ISSS (Spatial Sci)](http://www.spatialscientists.org/)
*   **Regional:** [AGBJ (Bihar/JH)](http://agbj.org.in/) | [RGA (Rajasthan)](http://rga.ac.in/) | [NEIGS (NE India)](http://neigs.org.in/) | [UBBP (North India)](http://ubbp.org/)
*   **Local:** [Konkan Geographers](http://konkangeographers.org/) | [GAG (Goa)](http://geographersassociationgoa.blogspot.com/) | [UGIT (Bengaluru)](http://ugit.net.in/) | [APGI (Chandigarh)](http://apgi.in/)
*   **Foundations:** [Practicing Geographers](http://practicing-geographer.org/) | [MBP (Pune)](http://mbpune.org/) | [RSAI (India)](http://rsai.org.in/)

<div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 20px;">
[View Full List (PDF/Image)](social/institutions_list.png){style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 50px; text-decoration: none; color: #7c3aed; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem;"}
</div>
:::
::: {.social-media style="display: flex; align-items: center;"}
[![](social/institutions_list.png){style="border-radius: 12px; width: 100%; box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);"}](social/institutions_list.png)
:::
:::

:::
